description: CompositionPurple and green printed sleeveless dress made of 100% polyester, above knee length, fully lined, round neck, pin-tucks on the chest and flaring pin-tucks at the waist.FitDress fitWash careDelicate machine wash using a mild detergentDo not bleach or tumble dryCool ironThis dress is made of polyester – giving smoothness, lustre, drape and easy-care practicality. The navy blue and pink floral print turns this simple dress into a style winner.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
